negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Missing payload-builder incident recording hook for scheduled transaction execution errors, including scheduled-only filtering, decoded Scheduler calldata, full error/source chain, debug text, and revert selector classification.
related_but_insufficient_code: ritual-metrics defines ScheduledIncidentInput/Trace fields for decoded call IDs, error chains, debug text, and revert selector metadata.
RPC exposes those fields, but no payload builder callsite records incidents on BlockExecutionError for SCHEDULED_TX_TYPE_ID transactions.

notes: Confirmed gap; data model alone is insufficient.
rationale: The incident recorder evolves from ScheduledEventNotFound-only recording to scheduled-transaction type filtering while retaining decoded scheduler calldata, full error/debug context, classified revert metadata, and added execution contexts.
statement: When payload building handles a BlockExecutionError for a transaction whose type is SCHEDULED_TX_TYPE_ID, it records a scheduled incident, including payload/block/transaction metadata, execution context and source, decoded scheduler selector/call_id/execution_index when calldata permits, full bounded BlockExecutionError display/source chain, debug representation, and classified revert selector/reason when available; non-scheduled transaction errors are ignored.
suggested_falsification_tests: Call maybe_record_scheduled_incident with a scheduled transaction and an error chain that lacks ScheduledEventNotFound and assert an incident is recorded with full chain and debug text; repeat with a non-scheduled transaction and assert no incident is recorded.
Force augmented scheduled transaction execution to fail and assert the recorded incident has execution_context augmented_scheduled_execute and tx_source augmented_scheduled.
Use 4-byte and 68-byte Scheduler execute calldata plus a known revert selector and assert selector-only or full call_id/execution_index decoding and revertReason classification.
summary: Scheduled execution error incident recording is absent as an end-to-end behavior.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Force scheduled tx BlockExecutionError in payload builder and assert an incident is recorded; current port has recorder structs but no payload callsite.
title: Scheduled execution errors record full incident context
